description: Check media_bridge.py process status and .env configuration for errors
command_preview:
# Check if media_bridge.py is still running and capture any error info
$proc = Get-Process -Name python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -like '*media*' -or $_.CommandLine -like '*media_bridge*' }; if (-not $proc) { $proc = Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '*media_bridge*' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine, CreationDate; Write-Output '=== media_bridge processes ==='; $proc | Format-List }; Write-Output '=== Checking for .en

CreationDate : 20260318124309.010098+060

               "# Check if media_bridge.py is 
               still running and capture any 
               error info
               $proc = Get-Process -Name python 
               -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | 
               Where-Object { 
               $_.MainWindowTitle -like 
               '*media*' -or $_.CommandLine 
               -like '*media_bridge*' }; if 
               (-not $proc) { $proc = 
               Get-WmiObject Win32_Process |

               Checking for .env file ==='; if

               .env') { Get-Content 'C:\Users\Re
